_comment: NO-REPEAT LEDGER for Zenie quote images. Every quote listed here has already been drafted/posted in a Zenie post and must NEVER be suggested again — not even reworded, re-attributed, or with a different caption. Matching is on the normalized text (`norm`: lowercased, punctuation stripped, whitespace collapsed), so curly quotes, trailing periods, and capitalization do not matter. The drafting agent (Step 2C) and the feedback agent must exclude every quote whose normalized text is in this list, regardless of what the Notion 'Zenie Posts' chart shows — assume anything ever drafted was posted. GitHub Actions (regenerate_quotes.py) appends to this automatically the moment it renders a quote image, so the rule is enforced at render time even if an agent slips. Seeded 2026-07-20 from all prior posts/*/zenie_drafts.md.

used.quote: You are not too much. You are just enough for the right person.
used.norm: you are not too much you are just enough for the right person

used.quote: Your standards are not the problem. Your patience is the medicine.
used.norm: your standards are not the problem your patience is the medicine

used.quote: You don't find yourself by looking for love. You find love by knowing yourself.
used.norm: you dont find yourself by looking for love you find love by knowing yourself

used.quote: Healing is not linear. Neither is loving yourself.
used.norm: healing is not linear neither is loving yourself

used.quote: Your peace is the prize.
used.norm: your peace is the prize

used.quote: She started writing. Everything changed.
used.norm: she started writing everything changed

used.quote: Romanticize your life before someone else does.
used.norm: romanticize your life before someone else does

used.quote: Your next chapter starts the moment you decide.
used.norm: your next chapter starts the moment you decide

used.quote: You yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
used.norm: you yourself as much as anybody in the entire universe deserve your love and affection

used.quote: The most powerful relationship you will ever have is the relationship with yourself.
used.norm: the most powerful relationship you will ever have is the relationship with yourself

used.quote: What you seek is seeking you.
used.norm: what you seek is seeking you

used.quote: There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside you.
used.norm: there is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside you

used.quote: The only journey is the one within.
used.norm: the only journey is the one within

used.quote: Until you make the unconscious conscious, it will direct your life and you will call it fate.
used.norm: until you make the unconscious conscious it will direct your life and you will call it fate

used.quote: She remembered who she was and the game changed.
used.norm: she remembered who she was and the game changed

used.quote: Breathe, darling. This is just a chapter, not your whole story.
used.norm: breathe darling this is just a chapter not your whole story

used.quote: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
used.norm: to love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance

used.quote: Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life?
used.norm: tell me what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life

used.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
used.norm: the wound is the place where the light enters you

used.quote: You yourself, as much as anybody, deserve your love and affection.
used.norm: you yourself as much as anybody deserve your love and affection

used.quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
used.norm: turn your wounds into wisdom

used.quote: The privilege of a lifetime is to become who you truly are.
used.norm: the privilege of a lifetime is to become who you truly are

used.quote: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
used.norm: knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom

used.quote: Your heart knows the way. Run in that direction.
used.norm: your heart knows the way run in that direction

used.quote: You are the sky. Everything else is just the weather.
used.norm: you are the sky everything else is just the weather

used.quote: Talk to yourself like you would to someone you love.
used.norm: talk to yourself like you would to someone you love

used.quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
used.norm: start where you are use what you have do what you can

used.quote: You do not just wake up and become the butterfly. Growth is a process.
used.norm: you do not just wake up and become the butterfly growth is a process
